description.en-US: A local-first iPhone app for collecting URLs, text, and images from the iOS Share Sheet.
description.zh-TW: 透過 iOS 分享表單收藏網址、文字與圖片的本機優先 iPhone App。

about.en-US: Keeps saved content private and organized with categories, pinning, and portable backup and restore—without requiring an account or cloud service.
about.zh-TW: 無須帳號或雲端服務，即可用分類、釘選與可攜式備份／還原功能，私密地整理收藏內容。

description.en-US: A .NET wrapper for WebP CLI with a simple command-line parameter builder.
description.zh-TW: WebP CLI 的 .NET 包裝函式庫，提供簡單易用的 CLI 參數建構器。

about.en-US: Makes WebP easier to use during development by providing a convenient wrapper around WebP CLI.
about.zh-TW: 透過封裝 WebP CLI，讓開發過程中使用 WebP 更加簡單方便。

description.en-US: A quick-start template for building Web APIs with Fiber, Wire, and Swagger.
description.zh-TW: 使用 Fiber、Wire 與 Swagger 建立 Web API 的快速起始範本。

about.en-US: Provides a structured foundation for developing Go Web APIs with dependency injection and generated API documentation.
about.zh-TW: 提供具備依賴注入與自動產生 API 文件能力的 Go Web API 開發基礎。

description.en-US: A utility for synchronizing files between locations.
description.zh-TW: 用於同步不同位置檔案的工具。

about.en-US: A focused project for making file synchronization workflows easier to automate and maintain.
about.zh-TW: 專注於讓檔案同步流程更容易自動化與維護。

description.en-US: A launcher for starting applications with environment-specific settings.
description.zh-TW: 使用環境專屬設定啟動應用程式的工具。

about.en-US: Designed to simplify application launching across different development and runtime environments.
about.zh-TW: 用於簡化不同開發與執行環境中的應用程式啟動流程。

title.zh-TW: 均值回歸的標準差通道分析

description.en-US: Daily closing prices are arranged into a rhythmic map of price movements. Find the position first, then decide your own investment pace.
description.zh-TW: 每日收盤價整理成一張有節奏的價格地圖。先看位置，再決定自己的投資步調。

about.en-US: Helps explore Taiwan stock market signals and make technical analysis more approachable.
about.zh-TW: 協助探索台股市場訊號，讓技術分析更容易理解與使用。

description.en-US: A Community PowerToys Run plugin for asking an LLM directly from the launcher.
description.zh-TW: 可在 PowerToys Run 啟動器中直接詢問 LLM 的社群外掛。

about.en-US: Brings an LLM-powered question-and-answer workflow into the PowerToys Run experience.
about.zh-TW: 將以 LLM 驅動的問答流程帶入 PowerToys Run 使用體驗。

description.en-US: A tool for taking and organizing notes while watching YouTube videos.
description.zh-TW: 用於觀看 YouTube 影片時記錄與整理筆記的工具。

about.en-US: Designed to make video-based learning and reference easier to capture, organize, and revisit.
about.zh-TW: 讓以影片為主的學習與參考內容更容易記錄、整理與回顧。

description.en-US: A controller project built around the Raspberry Pi Pico platform.
description.zh-TW: 以 Raspberry Pi Pico 平台為核心的控制器專案。

about.en-US: Explores embedded control workflows and hardware interaction with a compact microcontroller platform.
about.zh-TW: 探索以精巧微控制器平台實現嵌入式控制流程與硬體互動。
